name: mcp-app-parity-explorer

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=chat.html vite build
scripts.start: concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=chat.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch main.ts"

author: ASOS CIT
description: MCP App PoC — Interactive Parity Mapping Explorer for MSTR-to-PBI analysis
